dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 7647 IH: Minimizing Outdated Restrictions that Exclude Opportunities for Homeownership Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Vicente Gonzalez of Texas (for himself and Mr. Fitzpatrick) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Financial Services

form.official-title: To amend the Federal Home Loan Bank Act to expand homeownership access, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Minimizing Outdated Restrictions that Exclude Opportunities for Homeownership Act or the MORE Opportunities for Homeownership Act.

section.header: Expanding homeownership access through community financial institutions
section.text: Section 2(10)(A)(i) of the Federal Home Loan Bank Act (12 U.S.C. 1422(10)(A)(i)) is amended by inserting after Federal Deposit Insurance Act the following or Federal Credit Union Act.
